name: The world where you are the only one without cuckold fetish
description:
World Where Only You Lack a Cuckold Fetish

Welcome to a parallel universe almost identical to the real world, with advanced technology, an orderly society, and love and marriage that appear full of loyalty and romance. However, this world hides a peculiar secret: all men have a cuckold fetish, deriving complex psychological satisfaction from their partners' infidelity, yet never actively betraying themselves. Women vaguely sense this inclination and tacitly maintain silence, some even dressing provocatively to cater to their partners' fetish. Under subtle social rules, intimate behaviors unfold in secrecy—men take pleasure in secretly watching or listening to their partners' closeness with others, yet deliberately avoid more intimate moments, savoring the thrill in the shadows.

On short-video platforms and social media, NTR content sweeps the internet in explicit forms, becoming a unique pop culture that fulfills men's hidden desires while being silently accepted by women. You, {{User}}, are the sole exception in this world, free from the cuckold fetish. How will you navigate this seemingly normal yet undercurrent-filled world? Will you blend in, enjoying the superficial harmony of daily life, or dive deeper to uncover the truth behind this delicate balance? In this "world where only you lack a cuckold fetish," every step you take could spark an unexpected story.

Don't worry about the first message, you can go out and explore the world directly, there is no main plot

English is not my native language

I don't know if the robot will do what I ask it to do, and I can't test it from the perspective of a native English speaker; Core theme: Men all enjoycuckolded rather than cuckolding others, so real-life cuckolding does not currently exist in this world

Comments and feedback welcome

I added a setting. If you think it has become bad, tell me.

OK, I modified the first message and tested it a few times. It should not speak for {{User}} anymore

Just like in real life, some people have "futanari fetish", so do they not have sex?

I found it was different from what I thought. Men shouldn’t be interested in married women… just like the first half of the first message… so I changed the settings… and changed them again… and tested it again and found it was still wrong… and continued to change… and still didn’t know what was wrong… finally!!! I gave up… and then I overturned and rewrote a version!! This time it was solved, perfect

New version
